description: A customer's finance department requires a signed Proof of Delivery (POD) for a shipment before they can pay the invoice.

nodes.task_description: Find the shipment record associated with the customer's order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the specific shipment in the logistics system.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the signed POD document from the carrier's system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent downloads the scanned POD, which includes the recipient's signature.

nodes.task_description: Email the POD to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the signed POD to the customer's finance contact.
